sutta: on a certain location the exalted 1 was staying among the koreans at the township of the koreans called sadja naila then the exalted 1 in the 4 in the morning robin himself and taking outer rope and bowl approached the dwelling of supervasa of the kolians and on reaching it sat down on a seat made ready then superbassa of the koreans with her own hand satisfied and served the exalted 1 with choice food both hard and soft on seeing that the exalted 1 on seeing that the exalted 1 had eaten his fill and had washed both hand and bore supervasa of the kolian sat down at 1 side as she said thus the exalted 1 said this to supervasa of the koreans the aryan woman disciple who gives food gives 4 things to the receiver thereof what for she gives life she gives beauty she gives happiness she gives strength moreover giving life she is a partaker of life be deva or human giving beauty she is a partaker of beauty be diva or human giving happiness giving strength she is a partaker of it being as deva or human yes superbasa the aryan woman disciple who gives food gives these 4 things to the receiver thereof this short suta can see here that during the buddha's time after the lay people gave a meal to the monks generally they give a very short talk like in this the buddha only said a few lines and as uh thanksgiving and later maybe perhaps you know for a monk to give a short discourse every time he has a meal is after some time he runs out of ideas what to talk so from there is understandable and understandable how later monks started chanting because chanting would be easier you chant the same chant again and again every day instead of having to think of something to talk and then these 4 qualities if we give food to the manga the buddha said we give 4 things the first 1 is life these 4 things in bali is called iu vano sukang balang sometimes you hear us do the chant you can hear us are you is life because when you give food to a monk it sustains his life so he can live longer second 1 it gives beauty because when he has food especially good food the body looks better and the body is more beautiful looking and then the third 1 is happiness you give food to a monk he's happy and then the fourth 1 it gives him strength the body the the he takes some good food and the body becomes strong so in the same way the buddha said when you give these 4 things to a manga you also will receive it and you will receive it either in the human form or the deva [Music] or whatever place your reborn you would get these 4 things um so whenever we give food these 4 things we give and so it comes back to us very naturally now the next suta is
